messages.content: Hi, how are you doing? my pleasure to meet you. my name is Roman Thuma I work here in Indonesia, I am from Indonesia sorry to disturb you, contact me through my private Mail for a proper introduction and more details widodo30@hotmail.com so we can get to know more about our selves.
